block.caption: Figure 18-3 Peripheral blood smear. Erythrocytes (average diameter, ~7.5 μm) are present in all panels. A, Neutrophil. B, Eosinophil. C, Basophil. D, Lymphocyte. E, Monocyte. F, Platelets.
